---
title: "Lectures"
description: Experimental Design and Data Analysis for the Cognitive and Brain Sciences
output:
  html_document:
    toc: false 
    theme: cosmo
fontsize: 14pt
---

- Week 1
  - <a href="lectures/week_1/lecture_variable_types.html" target="_blank">Understanding variable types in R</a>
  - <a href="lectures/week_1/lecture_workspace.html" target="_blank">Understanding the Workspace in R</a>
  - <a href="lectures/week_1/lecture_container_types.html" target="_blank">Container Variable Types and Accessing Elements in R</a>
  - <a href="lectures/week_1/lecture_functions.html" target="_blank">Writing and Calling Functions in R</a>
  - <a href="lectures/week_1/lecture_container_type_coercion.html" target="_blank">Container Variable Type Coercion in R</a>
  - <a href="lectures/week_1/lecture_assignment_operators.html" target="_blank">Assignment Operators in R</a>
  - <a href="lectures/week_1/lecture_loops_cond_flow.html" target="_blank">Loops and Conditional Flow in R</a>
  - <a href="lectures/week_1/lecture_getting_help.html" target="_blank">Getting Help in R</a>
  - <a href="lectures/week_1/lecture_mre.html" target="_blank">Creating a Minimal Reproducible Example</a>

- Week 2
  - <a href="lectures/week_2/lecture_using_libraries.html" target="_blank">Using external libraries</a>
  - <a href="lectures/week_2/lecture_datatable_basics.html" target="_blank">Introduction to `data.table`</a>
  - <a href="lectures/week_2/lecture_add_update_col.html" target="_blank">Adding and updating `data.table` columns</a>
  - <a href="lectures/week_2/lecture_joins.html" target="_blank">`data.table` joins</a>
  - <a href="lectures/week_2/lecture_reshaping_datatables.html" target="_blank">`data.table` reshaping</a>
  - <a href="lectures/week_2/lecture_chaining.html" target="_blank">Chaining `data.table` calls</a>

- Week 3
  - <a href="lectures/week_3/lecture_intro_to_ggplot.html" target="_blank">Introduction to `ggplot`</a>
  - <a href="lectures/week_3/lecture_basic_plotting.html" target="_blank">Basic plotting with `ggplot`</a>
  - <a href="lectures/week_3/lecture_themes.html" target="_blank">Themes and customising appearance</a>
  - <a href="lectures/week_3/lecture_facets.html" target="_blank">Putting many plots on a single figure</a>
